description: Allowlist for lock file patterns that are exempt from staleness checks

validationRules.rule-1: Lock files matching allowedLockPatterns are exempt from staleness checks
validationRules.rule-2: Max staleness threshold is configurable via maxStaleAgeMs (default: 1 hour)
validationRules.rule-3: Stale locks in strict mode cause verification failure
validationRules.rule-4: bun.lock must exist for bootstrap reproducibility
